description_long: This kiosk is a freestanding, rectangular sign structure with a sturdy base and two vertical support poles. The front face features a large, framed display area with a printed sign that reads 'GET SKOOLD' in colorful, playful letters above a stylized purple object. The frame and support structure are made of a smooth, metallic or painted material, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The rear side is plain and unadorned, with no visible signage or openings. The base is wide and flat, providing stability for the upright sign. The overall design is simple, functional, and intended for high-visibility placement in public urban environments.
description: A modern, freestanding kiosk sign with a framed display reading 'GET SKOOLD' and a purple graphic, supported by two metal poles on a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the colorful 'GET SKOOLD' sign and purple graphic on the display panel.
description_view_1: Side-front angled view highlighting the depth of the frame and the clear visibility of the signage.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the kiosk with no signage or features.
description_view_3: Rear-side view emphasizing the solid, featureless back and the supporting structure.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign, integrated into the front display panel, text reads 'GET SKOOLD' with a purple graphic below
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular top with no overhang or decorative features, same material as frame
